name: skill-test
description: Full testing pipeline coordinator for Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: skill-test
plugins.description: 1 command + 1 skill (/skill-test). Orchestrates a 5+1 stage pipeline (Triage → static review → behavioral eval → regression → looper) for skills/agents, and a 7+1 stage pipeline for patterns. Supports --from-stage for resuming mid-pipeline.
